dsl:
direction right

Client [icon: monitor]
CDN [icon: cloud, color: purple]

VPC {
  API Server [icon: server, color: orange]
  Queue [icon: list, color: pink]
  Worker [icon: cpu, color: yellow]

  Data tier {
    Postgres [icon: postgresql, color: blue]
    Redis [icon: redis, color: red]
  }
}

Client > CDN
CDN > API Server
API Server > Redis: cache
API Server > Postgres: query
API Server > Queue
Queue > Worker
Worker > Postgres

Monitor Service [icon: bell, color: green]
API Server > Monitor Service
